title: Bridge Essay: The Chicken and Egg of Pride and Social Rank.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Wind/Pride** (Phase 4) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Wind/Pride to mechanistic neuroscience.

**The Chicken and Egg of Pride and Social Rank.** — Soc Psychol Personal Sci. PMID: 35251489. DOI: 10.1177/19485506211023619. Prior research has found an association between pride experiences and social rank outcomes. However, the causal direction of this relationship remains unclear. The current research used alongitudinal design (N = 1,653) to investigate whether pride experiences are likely to be acause, consequence, or both, of social rank outcomes, by tracking changes in individuals' pride and social rank over time.
